description: You are the Operations Director for a fine arts and antiques auction house. Your company has leased a large historic building for upcoming estate liquidation events. Transform the empty building shell into a functional auction house by constructing interior partition walls and doors to create a 'Secure Vault' and an 'Appraisal Office'. Define and name at least four distinct room zones: 'Auction Floor', 'Gallery', 'Vault', and 'Office'. Furnish the 'Auction Floor' with an auctioneer's podium or desk and at least 20 chairs or benches facing it. Place at least 8 display or storage units (such as cabinets, shelving, or display tables) distributed between the 'Gallery' and 'Vault'. Set up administrative areas with at least 2 desks and 4 chairs for registration and appraisal. Add at least 5 decorative or lighting items from the built-in catalog to elevate the space. Save the completed layout.
